atomic_units.action: Notify the HR Manager and Legal team
atomic_units.condition: If a BGV discrepancy is identified after the employee has already joined under a conditional joining arrangement
atomic_units.output: Notification sent to HR Manager and Legal team

atomic_units.action: Assess the nature of the discrepancy
Determine whether the discrepancy is minor and explainable
atomic_units.condition: Whether the discrepancy is minor and explainable

atomic_units.action: Close the BGV case and update the employee record
atomic_units.condition: If the discrepancy is minor and explainable
atomic_units.output: BGV case closed and employee record updated

atomic_units.action: Place the employee on administrative leave pending the outcome
